## Summary

Describe the change and its architectural impact.

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm format:check`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm test`

## Architecture and security

- [ ] The change respects Clean Architecture dependency direction.
- [ ] Configuration remains externalized and no secret is committed.
- [ ] Documentation is updated where behavior or developer workflow changes.
